mapper.select: SELECT a.badge_issu_id, a.badge_id, a.issu_type, a.issu_type_id, a.listen_cnt, a.issu_dtime, b.badge_nm, b.badge_desc, b.issu_af_img_url, b.use_yn, c.badge_type, c.badge_ui_type, c.background_rgb_value FROM tb_badge_issue a JOIN tb_badge b ON a.badge_id = b.badge_id JOIN tb_badge_type c ON b.badge_type_id = c.badge_type_id WHERE a.badge_issu_id = #{badgeIssueId} AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT a.badge_issu_id, a.issu_dtime FROM tb_badge_issue a JOIN tb_badge b ON a.badge_id = b.badge_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.confrm_dtime IS NULL AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_badge_issue SET confrm_dtime = NOW(), confrm_dvc_os_type = #{osType}, update_dtime = NOW() WHERE badge_issu_id = #{badgeIssueId} AND character_no = #{characterNo}
mapper.select: SELECT a.badge_issu_id, a.badge_id, a.issu_type, a.issu_type_id, a.listen_cnt, a.issu_dtime, b.badge_nm, b.badge_desc, b.issu_af_img_url, b.use_yn, c.badge_type, c.badge_ui_type, c.background_rgb_value FROM tb_badge_issue a JOIN tb_badge b ON a.badge_id = b.badge_id JOIN tb_badge_type c ON b.badge_type_id = c.badge_type_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.confrm_dtime IS NULL AND b.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.create_dtime DESC

SELECT a.badge_issu_id, a.badge_id, a.issu_type, a.issu_type_id, a.listen_cnt, a.issu_dtime, b.badge_nm, b.badge_desc, b.issu_af_img_url, b.use_yn, c.badge_type, c.badge_ui_type, c.background_rgb_value FROM tb_badge_issue a JOIN tb_badge b ON a.badge_id = b.badge_id JOIN tb_badge_type c ON b.badge_type_id = c.badge_type_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.create_dtime DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_badge_issue ( character_no, badge_id, issu_type, issu_type_id, issu_dtime, listen_cnt, update_dtime, create_dtime ) VALUES ( #{characterNo}, #{badgeId}, #{issueType}, #{issueTypeId}, NOW(),
#{listenCnt},
null,
NOW(), NOW() )
